subject: feat(charts): add repo-tor to internal repos (light gray)
body:
Adds repo-tor to INTERNAL_REPOS in chartColors.js so it renders as
light gray (#9ca3af) on charts, matching other internal/tooling repos.
Also reverts the incorrect tag-system changes from the previous commit.
